name: Combo Pack of Nighttime Cuddle Toy, 18 cm with Tuna Jerky Strips, 105g
description: Combo Pack of Nighttime Cuddle Toy, 18 cm with Kittos Tuna Jerky Strips, 105g- Kitty keeping you up at night with noisy toys and play? We’ve got the solution! Nighttime Cuddle Toy by Petstages is a fun, glow-in-the-dark toy that your cat can play with at any hour without waking you up. Ultra-soft fur is fun to snuggle with as well as play. Best of all, it contains catnip to keep kitty’s interest. The Nighttime Cuddle Toy by Petstages is a comforting and playful cat toy that your kitty can play with at any hour without waking you up.
